SL_ALERTNESS: The eyes shone in the dark, searching for prey to feed to its spiderlings.
SL_AXE: At some point, <Redacted> was wearing the shoes, grinning from ear to ear. It was uh, well it was quite strange. That wasn’t a smile. It was…
SL_BLACK_SWAN: Once, I tried to dream a happy dream with everyone.
SL_COCOON: Unsurprisingly, not a single employee volunteered to retrieve the corpse of their cocooned colleague.
SL_FRIEND: She was so sad that she had to leave her dear friends behind, so she came up with a brilliant idea!
SL_FUNNY_PRANK: So this little lady has made a decision! To stay here and never leave until laughter is restored to this place!
SL_GLITTER:
The shoes were colorless.
They will soon turn red.
SL_GOOEY_WASTE: Elijah fell to her knees and finally started to puke up the thing everyone else was vomiting.
SL_LAETITIA:
I couldn’t simply leave you all to rot…
Was it due to loneliness? I thought I never had attachment to such a feeling.
SL_LOOKOFTHE_DAY: One sunny day, just like that day they sincerely dried the laundry, they dried their own skin.
SL_LOVING_FAMILY: She began to look for her brothers. Her family who needed to wear the nettle clothing to be free from the curse. Ones whom she shared happy dreams with.
SL_MEAL: Peter was dragged to the ceiling in only a moment. The cocooned employee hanging off the ceiling of the Containment Unit will be a healthy meal for the spider’s offspring.
SL_OBSESSION: If I rendered those legs unusable, could I take the position of the protagonist?
SL_RED_EYES: It’s to protect the place where I belong…
SL_SANGUINE_DESIRE:
Only these shoes… can make me dance. They make me move!
I’ll gladly risk my feet being chopped off, no longer being able to walk…
SL_SHYNESS: If one tries to look at the face behind the skin, the result will not be pretty. The space behind their skin is the only personal space they have left. Leaving it uninvaded is the last bit of generosity the City can offer.
SL_SOCIAL_DISTANCING: The inability to show one’s face is perhaps a form of shyness. When throbbing emotions surge up from time to time, it’s best to simply cover the face.
SL_SURPRISE_GIFT: And when the kid meets someone she likes, she will give them a gift made all by herself. The gift’s content is a secret though!
SL_TODAY_EXPRESSION: Maybe I wouldn’t have felt as bad if I couldn’t approach you lot because of shyness.
SL_WELLWORN_PARASOL: Believing that it would turn white, the black swan wanted to lift the curse by weaving together nettles. All that was left is a worn parasol it once treasured.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_BLADE_RESONANCE.de: Consume a Mirage Blade from your hand, {IfUpgraded:show:upgrade and |}put it into the hands of all teammates.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_ARMAMENTS.desc: Upgrade up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_BLISTERING_BLADES1: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, trigger Mirage Blades in Personal Space on the target.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_BLISTERING_BLADES3: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, trigger Mirage Blades in Personal Space on the target.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_ARCHIVE.des: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your hand, draw pile, and discard pile and store them in [blue]Personal Space[/blue].

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_BURST.title: Burst

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_CAGE.title: Cage
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_CAPTURE.des: Unselected cards from your [gold]Reproduce[/gold] are stored in [blue]Personal Space[/blue].
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_COLLAPSE.de: Consume all your cards, add a Singularity to your hand that takes effect that many times {IfUpgraded:show:, immediately trigger the Singularity's effect once|}.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_CONJURE.des: Randomly add {Cards:diff()} cards from the [blue]Linked Spacetime[/blue] into your [blue]Personal Space[/blue].
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_DEFLECT.des: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you are attacked this turn, carve {STWDeflect} [gold]Chrono Marks[/gold] next turn.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_DISPATCH.de: Retrieve up to {Cards:diff()} cards from [blue]Personal Space[/blue].

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_DUPLICATE.d: The next card you play other than Duplicate is played {STWDuplicate} additional times.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_ERUPT.descr: Whenever you consume 1 [gold]Chrono Mark[/gold], deal {STWErupt:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_EXTEND.desc: Your next [gold]Reproduce[/gold] provides {STWExtend:diff()} additional cards as options.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_CHRONO_FLOW.descri: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Store up to {StoreCount:diff()} cards from your hand into [blue]Personal Space[/blue], and retrieve up to {RetrieveCount:diff()} cards from it.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BEACON3.descri:
All players' Block gained from cards is increased by 2.
Draw 1 additional card each turn.
At the end of each turn, gain 5 Block.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BEACON3.title: Beacon

All players' Block gained from cards is increased by 2.
Draw 1 additional card each turn.

All players' Block gained from cards is increased by 2.
Draw 1 additional card each turn.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BEACON5.title: Beacon
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BOMBARDMENT.de: Consume 2x cards from your Personal Space, for each card consumed deal {Damage:diff()} damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL|a random} enemy. Return unused [gold]Chrono Marks[/gold].
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BOW.title: Bow
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BUCKET.descrip: At the start of each turn, gain {STWBucketP:diff()} Block.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BUCKET.title: Bucket
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BUCKLER.descri: Effect: {Block:diff()}. Action: Gain Block, if the target's attack differs from current Block by no more than 2, apply [gold]Gap[/gold].
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_BUCKLER.title: Buckler
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_CLOCK.descript: At the end of each turn, deal {STWClockP:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_CLOCK.title: Clock
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_COMMANDER_STAN: Effect: {Block:diff()} and grant {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Action: All players gain Block.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_CROSSBOW.descr: Consume 1 material, deal {Damage:diff()} damage unaffected by Strength.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_CROSSBOW.title: Crossbow
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DEPLOY.descrip: {IfUpgraded:show:Choose|Discover} a card in [blue]Personal Space[/blue] and play it.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DEPLOY.title: Deploy
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DEPOSIT.descri:
When you draw this card, draw an additional card.
Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your hand to store in [blue]Personal Space[/blue].
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DEPOSIT.title: Deposit
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DESTINED.descr: Carve {ChronoMark:diff()} [gold]Chrono Marks[/gold]. At the end of your turn, if this card is in your [blue]Personal Space[/blue], play it automatically.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DESTINED.title: Destined
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DIAMOND_AXE.de: At the start of your next turn, gain {STWNVigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Can only be equipped once. Your Block gained from cards is increased by 4.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DIAMOND_CHESTP: Can only be equipped once. At the end of your turn, gain 9 Block.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_DOOR.title: Wooden Door

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_ESCHATON.descr:
When you draw this card, draw an additional card.
Add a Loneliness to your deck, cause ALL enemies to lose 34% of their Max HP and an equal amount of current HP, then end all characters' turns.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_ESCHATON.title: Eschaton
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_FATE.descripti:
When you draw this card, draw an additional card.
Randomly obtain a {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded|} card from the [blue]Pan-Spacetime[/blue].
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_FATE.title: Fate
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_FLING.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Play a random Attack card from [blue]Personal Space[/blue], targeting the same target if possible.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_FLING.title: Fling
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_GENESIS.descri: Reveal {Cards:diff} {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded|} cards from the [blue]Pan-Spacetime[/blue], [gold]Reproduce[/gold] up to one of them.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_GENESIS.title: Genesis

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_LONELINESS.des: Cannot be played. At the end of your turn, return to the top of your draw pile. If this card is in Personal Space, return to your draw pile. If this card is in the exhaust pile, move it to your discard pile.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD_STW_SINGULARITY.de: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], [gold]Dexterity[/gold], [gold]Focus[/gold], {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw 1 card, gain {Stars:starIcons()}, carve a [gold]Chrono Mark[/gold], [gold]Reproduce[/gold] 1 card, and Discover a card from your deck.

STW_REST_CARD_DESC_SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARD: 2C, can only be placed once, all players' Block gained from cards is increased by 2. [Multiplayer]
2C, add an additional effect to Beacon: all players draw 1 additional card each turn. [Multiplayer]
2C, add an additional effect to Beacon: all players gain 5 Block at the end of each turn. [Multiplayer]
2C, add an additional effect to Beacon: all players' attack damage dealt is increased by 3. [Multiplayer]
2C, add an additional effect to Beacon: all players gain 1 Regeneration at the start of each turn. [Multiplayer]
1C, returns to hand after use, consume 1 material, deal 25 damage.
0C, gain 3 Block at the start of each turn.
1C, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies at the end of each turn.
2C, returns to hand next turn after use, consume 1 material, deal 45 damage.
1C, can only be equipped once. Your Block gained from cards is increased by 4.
2C, can only be equipped once. Gain 9 Block at the end of your turn.
2C, can only be equipped once, damage taken from attacks is reduced by 30%.

2C, can only be equipped once. Gain 6 Block at the end of your turn.

2C, can only be equipped once. Gain 4 Block at the end of your turn.
1C, gain 10 Block, deal damage equal to half your Block.

2C, can only be equipped once. Gain 12 Block at the end of your turn.

Relic, can no longer be replaced with other cards. Once per game, after taking fatal damage, prevent that damage and recover 50% of Max HP, gain 5 Regeneration and 10 Plated Armor.
STW_REST_CRAFT_DESC: Upgrade or craft equipment using materials, does not consume a Rest Site use.
STW_REST_CRAFT_RETURN_DESC: Return to Rest Site main screen.
STW_REST_CRAFT_UPGRADE_DESC: Consume materials to upgrade Pickaxe level.
STW_REST_DOOR_MINECART_DESC: Consume {Cost} materials to unlock Minecart, free to replace after unlocking. 1C, gain 10 Block, deal damage equal to half your Block.
STW_REST_SHIELD_REPLACE_DESC: Consume {Cost} materials to unlock {Card}, free to replace after unlocking. {CardDesc}
STW_REST_SHIELD_TOTEM_DESC: Consume 20 materials to replace this slot with Totem of Undying for this run, cannot be undone. Once per game, after taking fatal damage, prevent that damage and recover 50% of Max HP, gain 5 Regeneration and 10 Plated Armor.
STW_REST_SPEAR_SPECIAL_DESC: Consume {Cost} materials to unlock {Card}, free to replace after unlocking. {CardDesc}
STW_REST_UPGRADE_PROGRESS_DESC: Consume 2 materials to reduce upgrade progress required by 1.
STW_RFS_CHOOSE: Choose up to one Mirage Blade.
STW_WITHDRAW: Choose up to {Amount} cards to retrieve from Personal Space.
